remarks.text: Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, compared
remarks.content: There’s a question we hear constantly from platform and engineering leaders right now, “which agent SDK should we standardize on for our Kubernetes clusters?” The honest answer is that the question is slightly wrong, and... The post Six AI agent SDKs for enterprise Kubernetes, comp
remarks.contentTranslation: 我们现在经常从平台和工程领导那里听到一个问题， “我们应该为我们的Kubernetes集群标准化哪个AgentSDK ？“老实说，问题有点不对劲，而且……企业Kubernetes发布的Six AI agent SDK ，
remarks.translation: 六个用于企业Kubernetes的AIAgentSDK ，比较
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
I'm really excited to share these upcoming episodes for my podcast soon.

One small ask: My birthday is on Thursday, July 9, and it would be amazing to finally hit 100K YouTube subscribers by then.

I’m at 98.5K now, so pretty close :)

📌 If you’re looking forward to these episodes, consider subscribing here: https://t.co/eOPREwafQV

I appreciate your support!
remarks.translation: 我很高兴能很快在播客中分享这些即将播出的节目。一个小问题：我的生日是7月9日星期四，到那时最终达到10万YouTube订阅者将是惊人的。我现在在98.5K ，非常接近:)📌如果您期待这些剧集，请考虑在这里订阅：感谢您的支持！

remarks.name: Nan Yu
remarks.role: head of product linear
remarks.text:
The “real-time strategy game” model of managing agents is clearly a dead end. 

AI that’s ancient by current standards already beats >99% of human players and out-micros them to an extreme degree
remarks.translation: 管理座席的“实时战略博弈”模式显然是一条死胡同。按照目前的标准，古老的AI已经击败了> 99%的人类玩家，并在极大程度上超越了他们
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
Still waiting on that one founder who gates a VC chat until they have played with the product and come with at least two pieces of feedback..

Blows my mind that people go on Zoom and chat for 30 mins on a parroted deck for literally the entire day - where it could have been a significantly more productive conversation if you just did a product brainstorm instead. Or even better just spend the entire time getting to know each other. 

Am I just weird? Like how do you (both founders while fundraising and VCs generally) do this all day? What alpha do you get from hearing the same story again? It’s just more efficient for both sides to upload their personal “prompts” to Claude at this point to do this digitally 😂
remarks.translation:
仍在等待一位创始人，他会关闭风险投资聊天，直到他们玩完产品并收到至少两条反馈。让我惊讶的是，人们在Zoom上聊天，在鹦鹉甲板上聊了30分钟，整整一天--如果你只是做一个产品头脑风暴，这可能是一个更有效率的对话。或者最好是把所有的时间都花在相互了解上。我是不是很奇怪？
就像你（两位创始人在筹款和风险投资时）整天是如何做到这一点的？你从再次听到同样的故事中得到了什么好处？此时，双方将他们的个人“提示”上传到Claude以进行数字化处理的效率更高 😂
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
So the real constraint on human wealth was never resources. It was good ideas for how to serve one another, and the leverage to act on them. We just deleted the leverage constraint for everybody. 

Now it's only the ideas. Go have them, and then build them. It's your time.
remarks.translation: 因此，人类财富的真正制约因素从来不是资源。这是如何互相服务的好主意，以及采取行动的杠杆作用。我们刚刚删除了每个人的杠杆约束。现在只剩下想法了。去拥有它们，然后建造它们。该你了。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text: I'm in Osaka now, and it's clear: Japan already ran the experiment on the ceiling. Thirty years of zero growth and it built the best trains, service, and craft on earth. When you can't compete on more, you compete on better. Better AND more at the same time.
remarks.translation: 我现在在大阪，很明显：日本已经在天花板上进行了实验。三十年的零增长，建造了地球上最好的火车、服务和手工艺。当你不能竞争更多时，你就能更好地竞争。同时做得更好，做得更多。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Cat Wu
remarks.role: claude code + cowork anthropicai, prev: dagster, scale_ai
remarks.text:
what are your top claude code + workflows + artifacts use cases?

one of my new favorites is for sourcing candidates:
- tell cc about the role and backgrounds i’m looking for
- ask cc to kick off a dynamic workflow to find 100 candidates, and include linkedin, twitter, blog, podcasts, and one-line pitch for each
- ask cc to make an artifact and email it to me. then, i lock my laptop and head out for the day
- i review the list on the go once cc is done!
remarks.translation: 您最喜欢的Claude代码+工作流+制品用例是什么？我的新最爱之一是寻找求职者： -告诉CC我正在寻找的角色和背景-让CC启动动态工作流以找到100名求职者，并为每个求职者包括Linkedin、Twitter、博客、播客和单行音调-让CC制作制品并将其通过电子邮件发送给我。然后，我锁定笔记本电脑并开始一天的工作-一旦CC完成，我就会随时查看列表！
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
Headed to Paris, Interlaken and Zurich after 20+ years in just a few days.. 

Hit me with your favorite spots that are kid-friendly (4.5 yr old + 1.5 yr old) and vegetarian-friendly. 

Trying to see if we can set up play dates with local families - DM if that’s you!
remarks.translation: 在短短几天内， 20多年后前往巴黎、因特拉肯和苏黎世。您可以在这里找到您最喜欢的儿童友好型（ 4.5岁+ 1.5岁）和素食主义者友好型景点。尝试看看我们是否可以与当地家庭安排游戏日期-如果您是DM ！
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Amanda Askell
remarks.role: Philosopher & ethicist trying to make AI be good AnthropicAI.
remarks.text: Extracting a probability from a doctor is one of life's unnecessary boss battles. Even if you beg them for an interval-valued subjective probability, and at that point you're basically asking for their hunch. I don't know if they get sued for giving out information or something.
remarks.translation: 从医生那里提取概率是生活中不必要的boss战之一。即使你乞求他们提供一个区间值主观概率，在这一点上，你基本上是在要求他们的直觉。我不知道他们是否会因为提供信息而被起诉。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Simon Willison's Blog
remarks.role: AI coding tools, LLM release notes, prompt engineering, datasette ecosystem, developer workflow observations.
remarks.text: Open Source AI Gap Map
remarks.content: Open Source AI Gap Map Current AI is "a global partnership building a public option for AI", founded as a non-profit at the AI Action Summit in Paris in February 2025 and backed by serious capital
